summary: Security audit verification completed. All 3 issues verified as FIXED: (1) autoComplete='new-password' correctly applied to 48 PIN/password inputs across 24+ files, (2) LoginPage correctly has NO autoComplete attribute allowing browser to save credentials, (3) cartItems bug fixed - grandTotal is now used in UnifiedSalesPage credit approval context. All 8 backend PIN verification tests passed.

bugs_verified_as_fixed.bug: Browser 'save password' prompt showing on PIN/TOTP inputs
bugs_verified_as_fixed.fix_verified: 48 PIN/password inputs now have autoComplete='new-password' (verified via grep)
bugs_verified_as_fixed.files_affected: AccountsPage, UnifiedSalesPage, BranchTransferPage, PurchaseOrderPage, ExpensesPage, DailyLogPage, ViewReceiptsPage, FundManagementPage, ProductsPage, JournalEntriesPage, AuditCenterPage, ImportPage, AccountingPage, ReturnRefundWizard, CloseWizardPage, TeamPage, SettingsPage, PODetailModal, ExpenseDetailModal, SaleDetailModal, SectionOverrideDialog, SmartProductSearch, PendingReviewsWidget, TotpVerifyDialog

bugs_verified_as_fixed.bug: LoginPage should allow browser to save credentials
bugs_verified_as_fixed.fix_verified: LoginPage.js password input (lines 97-105) has NO autoComplete attribute - browser can save login credentials

bugs_verified_as_fixed.bug: cartItems undefined variable crash in credit sale PIN verification
bugs_verified_as_fixed.fix_verified: UnifiedSalesPage.js line 892 now uses grandTotal instead of cartItems in verifyManagerPin context

context_for_next_testing_agent: Security audit complete. All PIN inputs across the app now have autoComplete='new-password' to prevent browser save password prompts. LoginPage intentionally has no autoComplete attribute to allow normal login credential saving. Backend PIN verification endpoints tested for all action_keys: credit_sale_approval, void_invoice, cancel_po, reopen_po, daily_close, fund_transfer_cashier_safe. The cartItems bug in UnifiedSalesPage credit approval is fixed (uses grandTotal now).
